name: open-presentation
description: Plugin-first, skill-compatible workflow for cinematic HTML presentations and video ads.

interface.shortDescription: Generate cinematic HTML presentations and video ads from briefs.
interface.longDescription: Install from GitHub and turn briefs, landing pages, screenshots, and notes into text-light, motion-heavy, zero-dependency HTML presentations with optional deterministic 4K WebM export.
defaultPrompt: Use open-presentation to build a launch video ad.
Use open-presentation to turn our pricing page into HTML scenes.
Use open-presentation to create a 9:16 product demo reel.
